tasks.label: Remote Flash (SSH)
tasks.command: BUILD_DIR="${command:cmake.buildDirectory}"; cmake --build "$BUILD_DIR" && scp "$BUILD_DIR"/*.uf2 rock@100.115.224.114:~/firmware.uf2 && ssh -t rock@100.115.224.114 'sudo picotool load -f firmware.uf2'
tasks.detail: Builds locally, copies to Rockchip, and flashes via picotool (auto-reboots).

tasks.label: Remote Monitor (SSH) Auto
tasks.command: ssh -t rock@100.115.224.114 'PICO_PORT=$(ls /dev/serial/by-id/usb-Raspberry_Pi_Pico* | head -n 1); if [ -z "$PICO_PORT" ]; then echo "Pico not found!"; exit 1; fi; minicom -D "$PICO_PORT" -b 115200'
tasks.detail: Automatically finds the Raspberry Pi Pico and opens a remote serial monitor
